mapper.select: SELECT * FROM VOLUNTEER ORDER BY vol_id
SELECT * FROM VOLUNTEER WHERE vol_status = #{volStatus} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM VOLUNTEER WHERE vol_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{volName}, '%') ORDER BY vol_id
SELECT * FROM VOLUNTEER WHERE vol_status = 1 ORDER BY vol_total_points DESC LIMIT 10
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO VOLUNTEER(vol_name, vol_account, vol_password, vol_gender, vol_age, vol_phone, vol_email, vol_idcard, vol_address, vol_emergency_contact, vol_emergency_phone, vol_skills) VALUES(#{volName}, #{volAccount}, #{volPassword}, #{volGender}, #{volAge}, #{volPhone}, #{volEmail}, #{volIdcard}, #{volAddress}, #{volEmergencyContact}, #{volEmergencyPhone}, #{volSkills})
mapper.update: UPDATE VOLUNTEER SET vol_status = #{volStatus}, vol_remark = #{volRemark} WHERE vol_id = #{volId}
UPDATE VOLUNTEER SET vol_total_hours = #{volTotalHours} WHERE vol_id = #{volId}
UPDATE VOLUNTEER SET vol_total_points = #{volTotalPoints} WHERE vol_id = #{volId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM VOLUNTEER WHERE vol_status = #{volStatus}
